PropertyTypes.Description: The minimum value of the slider.

PropertyTypes.Description: The maximum value of the slider.

PropertyTypes.Description: The maximum value of the slider.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Maximum value
PropertyTypes.Description: The maximum value of the slider.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Step size
PropertyTypes.Description: Value to be added or subtracted on each step the slider makes. Must be greater than zero, and max - min should be evenly divisible by the step value.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Step size
PropertyTypes.Description: Value to be added or subtracted on each step the slider makes. Must be greater than zero, and max - min should be evenly divisible by the step value.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Step size
PropertyTypes.Description: Value to be added or subtracted on each step the slider makes. Must be greater than zero, and max - min should be evenly divisible by the step value.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Tooltip type
PropertyTypes.Description: By default tooltip shows current value. Choose 'Custom' to create your own template.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Tooltip always visible
PropertyTypes.Description: When enabled tooltip is always visible to the user

PropertyTypes.Caption: Number of markers
PropertyTypes.Description: The number of marker ticks that appear along the slider’s track. (Visible when larger than 0)

PropertyTypes.Caption: Decimal places
PropertyTypes.Description: Number of decimal places for marker values

PropertyTypes.Caption: Orientation
PropertyTypes.Description: The orientation of the slider. If ‘Vertical’, make sure to set the either the height of the parent or slider to a fixed height.

type.WidgetDescription: Change a number value using a slider
